title: Jody Kamali This Is My Dad
description: After his father’s sudden death, Jody digs through his belongings, uncovering the man he thought he knew. Suddenly, he’s back for one hour to tell us who he was. Playing both himself and his father, Jody unpicks his Dad’s bizarre life in a thoughtful, funny theatrical solo show about grief, secrets and the contradictions within us all. A preview for the Edinburgh Fringe from award-winning, Brighton Fringe veteran Jody Kamali.

venue.name: Laughing Horse @ a&o Hostel bar (Front Room)
